_comment: Rate limiting configuration using Upstash Redis. Thresholds can be adjusted based on usage patterns.

messages_per_minute.description: Max messages a user can send per minute

api_calls_per_hour.description: Max API calls (recommendations, analysis) per hour

portfolio_updates_per_hour.description: Max portfolio sync operations per hour

alert_creations_per_day.description: Max new alerts created per day

sliding_window.algorithm: Sliding window counter (Redis INCR with TTL)
sliding_window.cons: Can briefly allow bursts at window boundaries

token_bucket.pros: Smooth rate limiting, allows controlled bursts

enforcement.notification_message: You've hit the rate limit. Please try again in a moment.

future_expansion.dynamic_limits: Adjust limits based on user subscription tier
future_expansion.gradual_backoff: Increase wait time after repeated violations
